name: Customer Support & Ticket Resolution
description: AI agents that triage, route, and autonomously resolve customer support tickets across channels (chat, email, phone). Includes FAQ answering, sentiment detection, escalation routing, and resolution tracking.
exampleWorkflows: Auto-classify incoming ticket, search knowledge base, draft response, route to specialist if confidence < threshold
Monitor customer sentiment during conversation, auto-escalate to human agent when frustration detected
Resolve password reset / account access issues end-to-end via system integrations

name: IT Helpdesk & Employee Support
description: AI agents that automate internal IT service desk operations: password resets, software provisioning, access requests, onboarding/offboarding, and IT troubleshooting across Slack, Teams, and email.
exampleWorkflows: Employee requests software access via Slack -> agent verifies role permissions -> provisions license -> confirms in thread
New hire onboarding: auto-create accounts, assign security groups, schedule orientation, provision equipment
IT troubleshooting: diagnose VPN issue via guided questions, apply known fix, escalate if unresolved

name: Code Generation & Software Engineering
description: AI agents that write, review, test, debug, and deploy code autonomously. Includes issue-to-PR workflows, dependency management, code review, documentation generation, and CI/CD integration.
exampleWorkflows: Read GitHub issue -> plan implementation -> write code -> run tests -> open PR with description
Monitor dependencies for security vulnerabilities -> generate patched PR with migration notes
Review incoming PR for bugs, style issues, and security vulnerabilities -> post inline comments

name: Data Research & Web Extraction
description: AI agents that autonomously browse the web, extract structured data, compile research reports, and monitor competitive intelligence. Includes web scraping, form filling, and citation-grounded research.
keyCapabilities: Structured data extraction from unstructured pages
exampleWorkflows: Define target schema (company name, funding, headcount) -> agent scrapes 500 company pages -> returns structured CSV
Daily competitive monitoring: check competitor pricing pages, changelog, job postings -> summarize changes
Multi-step research: search academic papers, extract methods and results, compile literature review with citations

name: Voice & Phone Agent
description: AI agents that handle inbound and outbound phone calls with natural voice interaction. Includes appointment scheduling, lead qualification, customer support calls, and live call transfer with context.
keyCapabilities: Live call transfer with context handoff
exampleWorkflows: Inbound call -> identify caller from CRM -> qualify need -> schedule appointment or transfer to sales rep
Outbound campaign: call leads from list -> qualify interest -> book demo -> log results in CRM
After-hours support: answer product questions from knowledge base -> create ticket if unresolved -> send summary email

name: Multi-Step Workflow Automation
description: AI agents that orchestrate complex multi-step business processes across systems. Includes trigger-based automation, multi-agent coordination, approval workflows, and cross-system data movement.
exampleWorkflows: New deal closed in CRM -> generate contract -> send for e-sign -> provision account -> notify CS team -> schedule onboarding
Invoice received via email -> extract line items -> match to PO -> route for approval -> process payment -> update ERP
Multi-agent research crew: researcher gathers data, analyst evaluates, writer drafts report, reviewer approves

name: DevOps & Infrastructure Management
description: AI agents specialized in Kubernetes operations, cloud infrastructure management, deployment automation, and incident response. Includes cluster diagnostics, Helm management, and monitoring integration.
exampleWorkflows: Alert fires in Prometheus -> agent diagnoses root cause via kubectl -> applies known remediation -> verifies recovery
Developer requests new service deployment -> agent generates Helm chart -> applies to staging -> runs smoke tests -> promotes to prod
Cluster health check: scan for resource bottlenecks, expired certificates, deprecated APIs -> generate remediation plan

name: Sales Prospecting & Lead Qualification
description: AI agents that research prospects, personalize outreach, qualify leads, and manage sales pipelines. Includes account research, email drafting, meeting scheduling, and CRM updates.
exampleWorkflows: New lead enters CRM -> research company and contact -> draft personalized email -> send -> track opens -> schedule follow-up
Qualify inbound leads via conversational AI -> score based on BANT criteria -> route hot leads to AE -> nurture others
Pre-meeting prep: research prospect company, recent news, mutual connections -> generate briefing doc for sales rep

name: Security Monitoring & Threat Response
description: AI agents that monitor for security threats, detect anomalies, enforce policies, and respond to incidents. Includes prompt injection detection, data loss prevention, ransomware detection, and compliance monitoring.
exampleWorkflows: Monitor AI agent inputs for prompt injection attempts -> block malicious inputs -> log incident -> alert security team
Detect unusual data access patterns -> freeze affected accounts -> initiate forensic analysis -> generate incident report
Continuous compliance scanning: check configurations against policy baselines -> auto-remediate drift -> generate audit report

name: Content & Document Generation
description: AI agents that generate websites, marketing content, reports, and documentation. Includes website generation, content writing, document formatting, and brand-consistent asset creation.
exampleWorkflows: Enter business description -> AI generates complete multi-page website with real content -> customize in visual editor -> publish
Marketing brief -> agent generates blog post, social media posts, email campaign -> review -> schedule for publication
Generate quarterly business report from data sources -> format with charts -> apply brand template -> distribute to stakeholders
